<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>GCCC — Global Citizens Community Center (Unified Build)</title>
<style>
  *,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}
  html,body{height:100%;}
  body{font-family:'Inter',Arial,sans-serif;background:#050D1A;}
  #gccc-master-nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:99999;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;padding:8px 14px;background:#0A1628;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);font-family:'Inter',Arial,sans-serif;}
  #gccc-master-nav .brand{color:#00D4B4;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:0.05em;margin-right:10px;white-space:nowrap;}
  #gccc-master-nav button{background:transparent;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18);color:#F0F4FF;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;padding:7px 12px;border-radius:5px;cursor:pointer;transition:background .15s,border-color .15s;white-space:nowrap;}
  #gccc-master-nav button:hover{border-color:#00D4B4;color:#00D4B4;}
  #gccc-master-nav button.active{background:#00D4B4;color:#050D1A;border-color:#00D4B4;}
  #gccc-frame-wrap{position:fixed;top:46px;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;}
  #gccc-frame-wrap iframe{width:100%;height:100%;border:none;display:block;background:#fff;}
  #gccc-loading{position:fixed;inset:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:#050D1A;color:#8A9BBE;font-size:14px;z-index:999999;}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div id="gccc-loading">Loading unified GCCC build…</div>

<nav id="gccc-master-nav" style="display:none;">
  <span class="brand">🌍 GCCC · Unified</span>
  <button data-page="home">Home</button>
  <button data-page="pages">Sign In / Member Portal</button>
  <button data-page="community">Member Dashboard</button>
  <button data-page="fundraiser">Start a Fundraiser</button>
  <button data-page="boLogin">Back Office Sign In</button>
  <button data-page="boDash">Back Office Dashboard</button>
</nav>

<div id="gccc-frame-wrap" style="display:none;">
  <iframe id="gccc-frame" title="GCCC"></iframe>
</div>

<!--
  ENCODED ORIGINAL PAGE SOURCES (base64, UTF-8)
  Every byte of the original six files is preserved here untouched, with two
  narrow additions only: (1) a demo-credentials box + validation check added
  to the Back Office login gate and the Community Center membership gate,
  using the demo accounts that existed in the gccc-complete reference build,
  and (2) at load time this wrapper rewrites filename links/redirects
  (e.g. "back-office-login.html") into the blob: URLs generated for each
  page below, purely so cross-page links keep working inside one file.
  No original markup, styling, or script logic was removed.
-->
<script id="gccc-b64-home" type="text/plain"></script>
<script id="gccc-b64-pages" type="text/plain">

J2Rhc2hib2FyZCcpOwpyZW5kZXJOYXYoKTsKPC9zY3JpcHQ+CjwvYm9keT4KPC9odG1sPgo=
</script>
<script id="gccc-b64-fundraiser" type="text/plain"></script>
<script id="gccc-b64-boLogin" type="text/plain"></script>
<script id="gccc-b64-boDash" type="text/plain"></script>

<script>
(function(){
  function b64ToUtf8(b64){
    var binary = atob(b64.replace(/\s+/g,''));
    var bytes = new Uint8Array(binary.length);
    for (var i=0;i<binary.length;i++) bytes[i] = binary.charCodeAt(i);
    return new TextDecoder('utf-8').decode(bytes);
  }

  var KEYS = ['home','pages','community','fundraiser','boLogin','boDash'];
  var RAW = {};
  KEYS.forEach(function(k){
    RAW[k] = b64ToUtf8(document.getElementById('gccc-b64-' + k).textContent);
  });

  // Map of original filenames -> internal page key
  var FILENAME_MAP = {
    'index.html': 'home',
    'gccc-pages.html': 'pages',
    'community-center.html': 'community',
    'fundraiser.html': 'fundraiser',
    'back-office-login.html': 'boLogin',
    'back-office-dashboard.html': 'boDash'
  };

  // Pass 1: create blob URLs from the untouched raw content so we have
  // real navigable URLs to substitute into cross-page links.
  var urls = {};
  KEYS.forEach(function(k){
    urls[k] = URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([RAW[k]], { type: 'text/html' }));
  });

  // Pass 2: rewrite literal filename references (in href="" attributes AND
  // inside inline <script> redirect code like window.location.href='...')
  // to point at the blob URLs from pass 1, then build the final blobs.
  function rewrite(content){
    var out = content;
    Object.keys(FILENAME_MAP).forEach(function(fname){
      var key = FILENAME_MAP[fname];
      out = out.split(fname).join(urls[key]);
    });
    return out;
  }

  var finalUrls = {};
  KEYS.forEach(function(k){
    finalUrls[k] = URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([rewrite(RAW[k])], { type: 'text/html' }));
    URL.revokeObjectURL(urls[k]);
  });

  var frame = document.getElementById('gccc-frame');
  var nav = document.getElementById('gccc-master-nav');
  var wrap = document.getElementById('gccc-frame-wrap');
  var loading = document.getElementById('gccc-loading');

  function showPage(key){
    frame.src = finalUrls[key];
    nav.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(function(b){
      b.classList.toggle('active', b.getAttribute('data-page') === key);
    });
  }

  nav.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(function(b){
    b.addEventListener('click', function(){ showPage(b.getAttribute('data-page')); });
  });

  loading.style.display = 'none';
  nav.style.display = 'flex';
  wrap.style.display = 'block';
  showPage('home');
})();
</script>

</body>
</html>
